title: Checkpoint v1
description: Schema for a correctness checkpoint comparing tensor outputs between a baseline and treatment run. Used to validate numerical equivalence and detect regressions.

checkpoint_id.description: Unique identifier for this checkpoint comparison.

run_id.description: Identifier of the run that produced this checkpoint.

layer_or_stage.description: Name or identifier of the layer or stage being checkpointed.

tensor_name.description: Name of the tensor being compared.

shape.description: Shape of the tensor (list of dimension sizes).

dtype.description: Data type of the tensor (e.g. float16, float32, bfloat16, int8).

comparison_method.description: Method used for comparison (e.g. absolute_difference, relative_difference, cosine_similarity).

reference_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the reference (baseline) tensor.

treatment_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the treatment tensor.

abs_error_summary.description: Summary statistics of absolute error between reference and treatment.

rel_error_summary.description: Summary statistics of relative error between reference and treatment.

cosine_similarity.description: Cosine similarity between reference and treatment tensors.

tolerance.description: Tolerance threshold used for the pass/fail decision.

passed.description: Whether the checkpoint comparison passed within tolerance.
